'''sadate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:writhingly|writhingly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-d-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:writhingly|writhingly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| sadate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:sadate|sadate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sadatesher|sadatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sadatesherĂ«m|sadatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sadatero|sadatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sadateshĂ«|sadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sadateshĂ«m|sadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisadatero|gokisadatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisadateshĂ«|gokisadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisadateshĂ«m|gokisadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosadankerom|gosadankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosadankeshĂ«|gosadankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosadankeshĂ«m|gosadankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosadankeya|gosadankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sadaterom|sadaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sadatemu|sadatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sadateya|sadateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisadaterom|gokisadaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisadatemu|gokisadatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisadateya|gokisadateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:sadadate|sadadate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sadadatesher|sadadatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sadadatesherĂ«m|sadadatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sadadatero|sadadatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sadadateshĂ«|sadadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sadadateshĂ«m|sadadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisadadatero|gokisadadatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisadadateshĂ«|gokisadadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisadadateshĂ«m|gokisadadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosadadankerom|gosadadankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosadadankeshĂ«|gosadadankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosadadankeshĂ«m|gosadadankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosadadankeya|gosadadankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sadadaterom|sadadaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sadadatemu|sadadatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sadadateya|sadadateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisadadaterom|gokisadadaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisadadatemu|gokisadadatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisadadateya|gokisadadateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:sĂŠdĂŠte|sĂŠdĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sĂŠdĂŠtesher|sĂŠdĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠdĂŠtesherĂ«m|sĂŠdĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sĂŠdĂŠtero|sĂŠdĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«|sĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m|sĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisĂŠdĂŠtero|gokisĂŠdĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«|gokisĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m|gokisĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosĂŠdĂŠnkerom|gosĂŠdĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«|gosĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gosĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosĂŠdĂŠnkeya|gosĂŠdĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sĂŠdĂŠterom|sĂŠdĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠdĂŠtemu|sĂŠdĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sĂŠdĂŠteya|sĂŠdĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisĂŠdĂŠterom|gokisĂŠdĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisĂŠdĂŠtemu|gokisĂŠdĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisĂŠdĂŠteya|gokisĂŠdĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:safdafte|safdafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:safdaftesher|safdaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safdaftesherĂ«m|safdaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:safdaftero|safdaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:safdafteshĂ«|safdafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safdafteshĂ«m|safdafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisafdaftero|gokisafdaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisafdafteshĂ«|gokisafdafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisafdafteshĂ«m|gokisafdafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosafdafnkerom|gosafdafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosafdafnkeshĂ«|gosafdafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosafdafnkeshĂ«m|gosafdafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosafdafnkeya|gosafdafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:safdafterom|safdafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safdaftemu|safdaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:safdafteya|safdafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisafdafterom|gokisafdafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisafdaftemu|gokisafdaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisafdafteya|gokisafdafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
